# Feature implementation

## Request

- Goal and user outcome:
- In scope / out of scope:
- Owning agent / reviewers:
- Base commit and `agent/<task-name>` branch:

## Discovery and design

- Existing architecture/utilities reused:
- Files/directories affected:
- API/data/tenant/security impact:
- Approval gates triggered:

## Acceptance and validation

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable
- [ ] Formatting, lint, typecheck, unit tests, integration tests, and builds pass
- [ ] Migration plus tenant-isolation tests included if applicable
- [ ] Security review completed if sensitive
- [ ] Diff contains no secrets, generated files, or unrelated changes

## Handoff

- Checks/results:
- Rollback/forward recovery:
- Risks/limitations:
- Draft PR (never merge/deploy automatically):
